subject: Re: Scorpion RIBS
body:
price?  for what?


----- Original Message ----
From: Emad Hanna <ehanna@nysgmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Monday, February 12, 2007 10:29:50 AM
Subject: FW: Scorpion RIBS


Jeffrey,

Here a few used Scorpion boats.


Let me know if you would like me to follow up on any of them.

457 Madison Ave

-----Original Message-----
From: Stewart Thornley [mailto:s.thornley@btconnect.com] 
Sent: Saturday, February 10, 2007 5:55 AM
To: Emad Hanna
Subject: Scorpion RIBS

Dear Mr Hanna

You details have been sent to us from Joy at Scorpion RIBs we are
located in the same yard an look after the brokerage Scorpions for them.
Joy thought that a couple of pre-owned Scorpions might be of interest to
you. We have attached these with photographs for your attention. 

If we can be of any further assistance to you then please do not
hesitate to contact us. We look forward to hearing from you. 

Regards
Stewart Thornley
Lymington Marine Sales Ltd
Haven Quay
Mill Lane
Lymington 
Hampshire
SO41 9AZ
